name: @hojai/ai-spec
description: AI-native spec for HOJAI projects — defines the schema for hojai.ai.md + .hojai/manifest.json + .hojai/capability.json so AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) can understand HOJAI projects.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/*.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
